# RSM Puerto Rico Job

Accepted offer for cybersecurity and compliance role.
Start date: May 1, 2026.
Location: San Juan, Puerto Rico.
Focus: HIPAA compliance, risk assessments, incident response.
Salary: competitive for PR market.
Reason for move: broader scope, compliance focus, team environment.
